---
title: "Methodology"
format: html
---

## Data Sources

This page will document all datasets used in the project, including housing prices, rent estimates, mortgage rates, and any supporting market indicators.

## Planned Methods

This project will likely include:

- descriptive analysis
- time series comparisons
- affordability calculations
- rent-to-price ratio analysis
- city-level market comparisons

## Notes

This page will serve as the technical appendix for the final project.
